All Updates

Quarterly Founder Update: Q1 2026

March 2026

Wins

  • Closed a new round for Bidwell Capital Fund with strong investor interest. The fund strategy is resonating, especially the tax-advantaged structures.
  • Penn Properties hit its highest occupancy rate to date in Q1. New revenue management systems are paying off.
  • Recorded a 10-episode sprint for the podcast with some great guests. The backlog is healthy.

Lessons

  • I underestimated how much energy context-switching between ventures takes. I'm experimenting with theme days, dedicating full days to a single business instead of splitting attention.
  • Delegation doesn't mean disappearing. The best results come when I set clear systems and then stay close enough to catch drift early.
  • Saying no continues to be the highest-leverage skill I'm developing.

What I'm Focusing On Next

  • Scaling the Bidwell Capital Fund investor community without sacrificing the quality of relationships.
  • Hiring a dedicated operations lead for Penn Properties so I can shift more time to fund strategy.
  • Rebuilding adampenn.com (you're looking at it).

What I'm Reading & Thinking About

  • Re-reading The Almanack of Naval Ravikant. The sections on leverage and judgment hit differently now.
  • Thinking a lot about the difference between being busy and being productive. They're almost opposites.
  • Interested in how other founder-operators structure their time across multiple ventures without burning out.
